rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors. Description from gemini-flash matches image more accurately ('Sayers', '1748', 'pro An.') than gpt-5-mini's version.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Sayers for capons, due November 1748, amounting to 5s 0d.

rows.description: Franklin's Capons 2 Leases pro anno Nov.1.1746
rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors. Description from gemini-flash matches image more accurately ('Franklin's') than gpt-5-mini's version.
rows.english_description: Annual payment to Franklin for capons from two leases, due November 1746.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Franklin for capons from two leases, due November 1746, amounting to 5s 0d.

rows.notes: Both extractors agree on description and amounts. Visual inspection confirms '01 00 00' in the amount columns.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Franklin, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on amount and description. Visual verification confirms £0, 15s, 0d. gemini-flash accurately extracted 'Barister' and '15s', and correctly identified 'now Franklin' as an interlinear annotation. gpt-5-mini misread 'Barister' as 'Banister' and the shillings amount as '2'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Barister (now Franklin), amounting to 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on amounts. Visual verification confirms £0, 2s, 6d. gemini-flash is correct for the amount. gpt-5-mini significantly misread the shillings and pence as '15s 0d'.
rows.english_description: Annual payment to Wilmott for capons.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Wilmott for capons, amounting to 2s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors. Corrected description from 'Ledenhall' to 'Leadenhall' based on visual verification of the image, as both extractors had a minor spelling error.
rows.english_description: Annual payment to Leadenhall, now held by Jesus College.
